Package ca.team4308.absolutelib.subsystems

Class Elevator

java.lang.Object
edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.SubsystemBase
ca.team4308.absolutelib.wrapper.AbsoluteSubsystem
ca.team4308.absolutelib.subsystems.Elevator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Sendable, Subsystem
public class Elevator extends AbsoluteSubsystem
Elevator helper with manual, position, and holding modes. Uses EncoderWrapper for position and MotorWrapper for motor control.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    Elevator.ElevatorConfig
    All units are meters, meters/sec, or meters/sec^2 unless noted.
    static enum 
    Elevator.Mode
    Operating mode for the elevator.
    static interface 
    Elevator.OutputFilter
    Contract for modifying the computed output based on additional context (e.g., sensors).

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class ca.team4308.absolutelib.wrapper.AbsoluteSubsystem

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT_CANCODER_CPR

      public static final double DEFAULT_CANCODER_CPR
      Default counts-per-revolution used for the CANCoder convenience constructor.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • mode

      protected Elevator.Mode mode

    • targetPositionMeters

      protected double targetPositionMeters

    • manualPercentOutput

      protected double manualPercentOutput

  • Constructor Details

    • Elevator

      public Elevator(MotorWrapper leaderMotor, MotorWrapper.MotorConfig motorConfig, int encoderCanId, double gearRatio, double drumDiameterMeters, double maxHeightMeters, double minHeightMeters, double maxVelocityMetersPerSec, double maxAccelerationMetersPerSecSq, double toleranceMeters, MotorWrapper... followers)
      Parameters:
      leaderMotor - configured leader motor
      motorConfig - optional motor config applied to leader and followers (null to skip)
      encoderCanId - CAN id of the CANCoder
      gearRatio - sensor rotations per mechanism rotation
      drumDiameterMeters - drum diameter (meters) for linear conversion
      maxHeightMeters - top soft limit (meters)
      minHeightMeters - bottom soft limit (meters)
      maxVelocityMetersPerSec - nominal max velocity for planning/telemetry (meters/sec)
      maxAccelerationMetersPerSecSq - nominal max accel for planning/telemetry (meters/sec^2)
      toleranceMeters - position tolerance for atTarget()/HOLDING (meters)
      followers - zero or more follower motors (matched to leader)

    • Elevator

      public Elevator(MotorWrapper leaderMotor, MotorWrapper.MotorConfig motorConfig, EncoderWrapper encoder, Elevator.ElevatorConfig config, MotorWrapper... followers)
      Preferred constructor using an encoder abstraction and explicit configuration. No overridable methods are invoked during construction.
      Parameters:
      leaderMotor - configured leader motor
      motorConfig - optional motor config applied to leader and followers (null to skip)
      encoder - elevator position source
      config - geometry and constraints
      followers - zero or more follower motors (matched to leader)

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public final void initialize()
      Invoke once to allow subclasses to do one-time setup.
      Overrides:
      initialize in class AbsoluteSubsystem

    • setManualPercent

      public final void setManualPercent(double percent)
      Set manual/open-loop control percent output and switch to MANUAL mode. Clamps to configured output limits.

    • setPosition

      public final void setPosition(double meters)
      Set the target height in meters and enter POSITION mode. The target is clamped to [minHeightMeters, maxHeightMeters].

    • stop

      public final void stop()
      Stop the elevator (percent output = 0) and enter IDLE mode. Triggers onStop() after the mode change.
      Overrides:
      stop in class AbsoluteSubsystem

    • getCurrentPosition

      public final double getCurrentPosition()
      Current position in meters from the EncoderWrapper.

    • getMode

      public final Elevator.Mode getMode()
      Current operating Elevator.Mode.

    • getTargetPosition

      public final double getTargetPosition()
      Current position target in meters.

    • atTarget

      public final boolean atTarget()
      True when the current position is within the configured tolerance of the target.

    • setEncoder

      public final void setEncoder(EncoderWrapper newEncoder)
      Swap the encoder instance at runtime (useful for redundancy or calibration).

    • onInitialize

      protected void onInitialize()
      Main update loop: calls pre-hook, runs the handler for the current mode, then calls post-hook. Override the run or compute/apply methods for custom control.
      Overrides:
      onInitialize in class AbsoluteSubsystem
